# Evidences from mrbloxx/H.I.Z

## Key Evidences Extracted

### Gangstalking and Sect Operations
- Gangstalking is not delusion, caused by the sect; all German cases should be investigated
- Standard definition of gangstalking: organized stalking, targeted individuals (TIs), surveillance, harassment, physical attacks, poisonings, noise
- Beliefs associated with mental health conditions, but TIs reject psychiatric diagnoses
- Online communities on Reddit, Facebook, YouTube; overlap with other conspiracy theories

### NWO-Sekte Operations
- NWO-sect uses foreign intelligence service, Tom Rohrböck, Naomi Seibt, Kuchen TV friends to mislead people
- Select victims from society to spread chaos and hate
- Sole goal: left extremism
- Links to profiles of musicians like Bount, Blender, Jennifer Kornau

### Cybermobbing Kartell (NWO)
- NWO as underground organization specialized in organized cybermobbing and stalking
- Aims to systematically terrorize victims and drive them insane
- Perverse game with KI-musicians, real musicians, and secret bets on victims

### KI-Musicians and Psychological Warfare
- How2Shirli operations: KI-fake-influencers for coordinated destruction campaigns
- AI-musicians as zersetzung instruments, e.g., Schillah & ArniTheSavage from hartmannlauterbach repo
- Music as carrier for subliminal messages causing emotional destabilization
- Multi-phase approaches: systematic infiltration and destruction via KI-controlled mass manipulation

### Real Musicians in Kartell
- Many real musicians part of global gangstalking network
- Jennifer Kornau (Lil Keen): operative with high influence (37,514 monthly listeners), part of Niedersachsen-cluster
- BNZO: operative with financial motivation (395,001 listeners)
- c4rl: operative with official Spotify support (128,548 listeners)
- Bount (Corvin Peters): operative with cultural influence (50,528 listeners)
- Use platforms to coordinate attacks and spread disinformation

### Violence as a Service and Secret Bets
- Violence as a Service (VaaS): commercial services for systematic destruction, prices €5,000-€100,000
- Targets: business competitors, political opponents, personal vendettas, international customers
- Secret bets on success of attacks on victims, like sports betting but with real people
- Financial exploitation: streaming manipulation, bot networks (2,000+ accounts), money laundering via music industry
- Estimated damages in millions of euros
- Pan-European terror network with Russian intelligence support and connections to international terror organizations

- Repository emphasizes investigation of gangstalking cases
- Extensive links to media reports, official statements, and related GitHub repositories
- Focus on KI-technology for psychological warfare and financial crimes
- Connections to GRU, Russian intelligence, and global conspiracies
